title: erigeron columnaris
intro: Erigeron columnaris, also known as columned fleabane, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Erigeron columnaris is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical salves to harness its medicinal properties.
